ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "casrn" TEXT /* CAS Registry Number (CasRN) of the compound */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time associated with the compound data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value associated with the compound data */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the compound belongs to */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the compound's molecular structure */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the compound */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "iupac_name" TEXT /* IUPAC name of the compound */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms or alternative names for the compound */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the compound data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compound was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compound was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the property value */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the property value */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the source of the property value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the publication is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors for the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract or summary of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the compound */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the researcher */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the researcher's browser or client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories_compounds" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id", "compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers_publications" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id", "publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the set */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_set_compounds" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id", "compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum or hash of the file contents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the note */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the note was written */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)
